text.title: CR Impact Memo Template — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the impact rubric assigned a bin AND is the approver known?

conclusion.verdict: draft memo and route to approver

example.trace: CR-101 → rubric bin=M → approver=PO → draft memo with deltas + recommendation
